title: PNB Housing Finance Q4 profit surges 19% to Rs 656 crore with strong retail growth
summary: PNB Housing Finance reported a 19% rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 656 crore. FY26 profit grew 18% to Rs 2,291 crore. The company proposed Rs 8 per share dividend while its assets under management expanded 13% to Rs 90,921 crore with strong retail loan growth.

title: India Inc borrowed $4.6 billion from overseas markets in February
summary: Indian corporates raised $4.60 billion in ECB in February, 14% lower than January. Over 100 firms borrowed $4.20 billion via the automatic route, while Piramal Finance took $400 million via approval. ABC Cleantech led with $595 million.

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Tuesday

title: Market Trading Guide: Buy CESC and Trent on Tuesday for near term gains up to 9%
